copy.headline: Coverage watch for release planning
copy.supporting_text: PRD-03 Data API still shows uncovered sections before Friday sign-off.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Confirm the dashboard loads with KPI, coverage, progress, graph, and gap panels visible.
Coverage drill-down should stay in the dashboard context rather than hard-navigating away.
The selected requirement should expose linked task context inline.
Gap analysis should remain actionable from the same route.
Create Plan must use the normalized side-panel or mobile full-screen overlay pattern, not a modal.

trajectory_plan.assertion: refreshed gap panel shows the new plan linked to the originating gap after save

copy.headline: Recover from dashboard data outage
copy.supporting_text: Gap analysis must remain actionable even when the backend stalls.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: The route should surface a specific error state instead of a blank page.
Retry should be directly available from the route-level error banner.

trajectory_plan.assertion: panel aligned loading skeletons appear while coverage, progress, graph, and gaps data rehydrate
dashboard returns to the populated state with all four panels restored

copy.headline: Move a task across the ART board
copy.supporting_text: The board should confirm work is advancing without leaving the Kanban context.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: The chosen board level should be explicit before drag-and-drop begins.
Dragging a card should preserve the user in board context instead of navigating away.

trajectory_plan.assertion: column or card level saving feedback appears while the REST update is in flight
card bd-m8k2 now appears in In Progress with assignee Hoang Vu

copy.headline: Resolve an escalated task from the board
copy.supporting_text: An agent reported a blocked dependency chain on the analytics exporter.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Escalated tasks should reveal RTE context in a drawer or full-screen overlay depending on breakpoint.
The RTE must see evidence before making a decision.
Decision text should remain attached to the escalation context.
Publishing the resolution should close the drawer and update the board card state.

trajectory_plan.assertion: the escalated card returns to the board with updated execution context visible

copy.headline: Record PI confidence before kickoff
copy.supporting_text: Human confirmation is required before sprint launch.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Confidence voting should happen in the PI planning context, not in a detached modal.
The vote should be informed by risk and capacity evidence.
Voting must produce explicit confirmation feedback in context.

trajectory_plan.assertion: the confidence panel reflects the submitted level 4 vote

copy.headline: Approve a delivery gate after evidence review
copy.supporting_text: The final panel combines tests, diff, traceability, and CI status in one place.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: The queue should lead directly into aggregate evidence and approval context.
Approval must be grounded in the consolidated evidence stream.
Approval should require a visible comment path before the item leaves the queue.

trajectory_plan.assertion: the request leaves the queue and the linked work item is marked complete

copy.headline: Reject a request with failed tests
copy.supporting_text: Approval must stop when the CI evidence contradicts the submitted claim.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: The queue item should expose failed evidence clearly before any decision is made.
Reject must remain available without hiding the evidence context.
Rejection feedback should be explicit enough for downstream recovery.

trajectory_plan.assertion: feedback is pushed back to the linked task and PR after rejection

copy.headline: Traverse from a PRD section to graph context
copy.supporting_text: The viewer should bridge prose requirements and implementation evidence.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Document navigation should preserve document structure and current selection.
Beads links must be discoverable within the content body.
The trace route should receive the selected Beads ID as context.

trajectory_plan.assertion: the node detail panel shows linked plans and tasks for br-prd04-s5

copy.headline: Recover from an unindexed document library
copy.supporting_text: Users need a direct next step when Zvec has not ingested content yet.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: The empty state should explain why content is absent.
Recovery must be actionable from the empty state itself.

trajectory_plan.assertion: document navigation and content return after the reindex recovery path completes

copy.headline: Inspect partial graph data while GitHub enrichment is still loading
copy.supporting_text: Local task lineage should appear first instead of blocking the entire page.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: The route should prioritize local graph rendering before remote enrichment finishes.

trajectory_plan.assertion: local nodes are visible while a loading_github_data badge remains present

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Partial state must still support node inspection and analysis.
Depth changes should remain route-local and update the graph in place.

copy.headline: Edit a task and confirm the audit trail updates
copy.supporting_text: Optimistic field saves should remain visible and accountable.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Task detail should expose identity, editable fields, and tab structure immediately.
Field-level changes should trigger saving feedback without losing surrounding context.

trajectory_plan.assertion: field local saving feedback appears while the write request is in flight

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Audit history should be reachable without a full page reload.

trajectory_plan.assertion: activity includes the event status changed to done

copy.headline: Queue an edit offline and resolve sync conflict later
copy.supporting_text: Read-only analytics remain visible while writes are deferred locally.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Offline state must preserve navigation and show that writes are deferred.
The interface should clarify that the edit is queued rather than fully committed.
Sync recovery should surface once connectivity returns.
Conflict resolution should return the user to a stable task detail state.

trajectory_plan.assertion: the task remains readable and the conflict banner is dismissed after reconciliation

copy.headline: Jump from global search to a task record
copy.supporting_text: Instant suggestions should shorten the path to active defects.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Global search shortcuts should focus the shared shell search field when allowed.

trajectory_plan.assertion: the page indicates task doc commit and PR sources are being queried

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Selecting a task result should navigate directly to task detail.

trajectory_plan.assertion: task detail opens for bd-x1y2 with owner, status, trace links, and activity

copy.headline: Recover from an over-filtered search
copy.supporting_text: Users should know whether the issue is the query or the filter scope.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: The interface should distinguish empty results caused by restrictive filters.
Recovery guidance should remain visible within the empty state.

trajectory_plan.assertion: grouped results repopulate after filters are cleared

copy.headline: Assign a batch of open tasks
copy.supporting_text: Bulk actions keep staffing changes from becoming repetitive table work.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Filtering should update the current result set without changing routes.
Bulk actions should remain hidden until rows are actually selected.
The bulk action bar should expose assignee choices only when active.

trajectory_plan.assertion: bulk controls disable and progress feedback appears while assignees update
selected rows show DevBot01 after the bulk operation completes

copy.headline: Export a filtered delivery report
copy.supporting_text: PMO reporting depends on the current filter context, not a generic dump.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Exports should inherit the current filter scope.
CSV export must remain separate from destructive or bulk actions.

trajectory_plan.assertion: the downloaded file name reflects active filters and the current date

copy.headline: Trace downstream impact from the RTM graph
copy.supporting_text: Requirement changes should expose affected plans, tasks, commits, and tests without leaving the analysis flow.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Graph interactions should surface contextual detail without immediately leaving the dashboard.

trajectory_plan.assertion: a side panel shows linked plan task commit and CI evidence for the selected node

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: The dashboard graph should support exploratory comparison before deeper navigation.
Deep analysis should route into the dedicated trace explorer.

trajectory_plan.assertion: trace explorer opens with the selected requirement in focus

copy.headline: Reject an invalid escalation from the board drawer
copy.supporting_text: The RTE must be able to return unsupported risk claims with explicit guidance for the agent.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Escalation review begins from the board card itself.
The drawer should present enough thread context to justify rejection.
Reject guidance should be explicit and reusable by the agent receiving it.
Rejection should close the overlay and restore the updated board state.

trajectory_plan.assertion: the card returns to normal board context with rejection guidance recorded

copy.headline: Navigate from the workspace home to an individual task
copy.supporting_text: Primary navigation should move from summary metrics to the actionable task record in a short path.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Global navigation should keep route changes predictable across modules.
Task row selection should navigate to the matching detail route.

trajectory_plan.assertion: detail view loads owner status trace links and activity history

copy.headline: Inspect a saved chat session and follow a linked beads reference
copy.supporting_text: Historical discussions should remain explorable so implementation context is not lost after handoff.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Chat transcripts should be browsable within the same document hierarchy as PRDs and plans.
Cross-linked beads references should remain discoverable in saved conversations.
Following the link should move into graph analysis with the selected node preloaded.

trajectory_plan.assertion: the graph opens on the referenced requirement and its downstream tasks

copy.headline: Open dependency trace from a task detail record
copy.supporting_text: Task owners need to verify upstream plans and downstream delivery evidence before changing execution.

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Dependency insight should be available from the task detail record before full-page navigation.
Selecting a dependency should navigate into the trace explorer with the right root.

trajectory_plan.assertion: the graph shows task to plan to PRD upstream and task to PR to CI downstream

trajectory_plan.reasoning_checkpoint: Document nodes should remain navigable back into the document viewer.

trajectory_plan.assertion: the linked document opens with matching beads context visible
